description: Fixture: Claim → Evidence → ExplanationTrace → PolicyDecision chain for a technical-document claim. This fixture illustrates the full governed-intelligence admission pipeline for the 'Govern' step of the canonical loop.
canonicalLoop: Observe -> Anchor -> Normalize -> Propose -> Explain -> Verify -> Govern -> Act -> Receipt -> Learn
governStep: ClaimAdmissionPolicy evaluates the claim after Verify produces an ExplanationTrace.

claim.proposedText: The SourceOS guardrail-fabric repo owns the Govern step for claim admission.

explanationTrace.reasoning: The README and sourceos-agent-reliability-control-plane.md define guardrail-fabric as owning the Govern step.

policyDecision.reason: Claim 'fixture-chain-claim-001' meets all evidence requirements and review gates.
policyDecision.remediation: No action required. Record the admission in the claim registry.

consumers.sherlock: Produces Evidence (citationId, sourceTrust) consumed by ClaimAdmissionPolicy.
consumers.agentplane: Consumes PolicyDecision as a completion gate before Act step.
consumers.sociosphere: Coordinates parent workflow via PolicyDecision refs.
